calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Judgment as to Defendant Heirs, Devisees and Estate of Julien Ruwich AKA Julien L. Ruwich and Defendant All Person Claiming Any interest or Lien upon the Real Property Herein Described or any part thereof.

Dept.505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:45 p.m. and concluding at 1:54 p.m.. (D505)

Joanna Kozubal, Esq. appeared for and on behalf of Plaintiff Loreen Jung.
Plaintiff and Administrator of Estate Loreen Jung was placed under oath and testified.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Quiet Title filed on December 29, 2022.
Proof of Publication as to Defendants filed March 29, 2023.
Order substituting Plaintiff filed May 25, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendants on May 31, 2023.
Dismissal as to Defendant Does 1 through 20 filed on June 21, 2023.

The Plaintiff offers proof and submits the following for the Court's review.
Exhibit 1: Purchase Agreement
Exhibit 2: Grant Deed
Exhibit 3: Certificate of Death
Exhibit 4: Declaration of Private Investigator
Exhibit 5: Attorney Search
Exhibit 7: Letters of Administration

The Court admits exhibits as evidence.

The Court finds based on the evidence and statements made rules in favor of the Plaintiff as follows:

William Chan was on December 29, 2022, the date of the commencement of the above-entitled action, the owner in fee simple, an in actual and peaceable possession of the real property which is subject of this matter described as follows:

PARCEL ONE: Commencing at the point of intersection of the Southerly line of Anza Street, and Westerly line of 24th Avenue, running thence Westerly along said line of Anza Street 35 feet; thence at a right angle Southerly 73 feet 7 3/4 inches; thence Notheasterly to a point on the Westerly line of 24th Avenue, distant thereon 64 feet 5 inches Southerly from the Southerly line of Anza Street; thence Northerly along said line of 24th Avenue 64 feet 5 inches to the point of commencement.

Being Part of Outside Land Block No.307

PARCEL TWO: Beginning at a point on the Westerly line of 24th Avenue, distant thereon 76 feet 8 inches Southerly from the Southerly line of Anza Street; running thence Westerly at right angles to said line of 24th Avenue 42.286 feet; thence at an angle Northeasterly 15?50'34" 43.956 feet, more or less, to a point on said Westerly line of 24th Avenue, distant thereon 64 feet 8 inches Southerly from the Southerly line of Anza Street; thence Southerly along said line of 24th Avenue 12 feet to the point of beginning.

Being a portion of Outside Land Block No.307

APN: 1567/001, Commonly know as 601-60724th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94121.

It is Further Ordered, Adjudged and Decreed that no person other than William Chan at the time of commencement of this matter had any estate, right title, interest or claim in or to the real property described herein, or any part thereof, either legal or equitable, present or future, vested or contingent.

William Chan passed away on February 24, 2023. On March 29, 2023, Loreen Jung, niece of William Chan, filed a Petition for Letters of Administrator, Case No. PES-23-306159 and was appointed as an administrator of the decedent William Chan's estate with full authority. On May 25, 2023, the court substituted Plaintiff William Chan with Loreen Jung as the Administrator of Estate of William Chan.

It is Further ordered, adjudged, and decreed that title to the real property described herein is established and quieted against the all world as of this date in Loreen Jung as the Administrator of Estate of William Chan.

Proposed order signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
